text:
- **Absorb mess**: deviations (missed reps, skips, subs, pain, fatigue, missed sessions) are first-class, feed planning.
- **Planned vs. actual**: always preserved separately; AI never edits factual completed logs. [...] - **Deviation is the happy path.** Most trackers make the plan sacred and logging deviations painful. Here the plan is disposable and reality is the source of truth.
